cards.sitesDescription: Manage your conservation sites, boundaries, and location data.
cards.audioDescription: Manage biodiversity audio recordings tied to your sites.
cards.treesDescription: Manage tree records and linked photos.
cards.bumicertsDescription: Create and manage verified impact certificates for your work.

errors.uploadDescription: We had trouble loading your organization's data. Please try again.
errors.accountDescription: We had trouble fetching your account data. Please try again.
errors.sitesDescription: We had trouble fetching your sites. Please try again.
errors.sitesInline: Failed to load sites. Please try refreshing.
errors.audioDescription: We had trouble fetching your audio recordings. Please try again.
errors.treesUploadDescription: We had trouble opening the tree upload flow. Please try again.
errors.treesManageDescription: We had trouble fetching your uploaded tree records. Please try again.

sites.title: Sites
sites.emptyDescription: Add your first site to get started.

audio.title: Audio Recordings
audio.description: Upload and manage audio recordings for your organization.
audio.emptyDescription: Upload your first audio recording to get started.
audio.dropPlaceholder: Drop or click to upload audio
audio.fileRequirements: WAV, MP3, M4A, AAC, FLAC, OGG, WebM, AIFF (max 100 MB)
audio.name: Name
audio.descriptionPlaceholder: Recorded at the main observation site
audio.browserUnsupported: Your browser does not support the audio element.

dashboard.registerIncomplete: Complete the organization fields before registering as an organization.
dashboard.countryRequired: Country is required to register as an organization.
dashboard.accountNotReady: Account data is not ready to save yet.

profile.aboutPlaceholder: Tell the world about your organization — its mission, history, and the work you do…

modals.websiteInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://yourorg.com)
modals.imageCoverDescription: Upload a new cover photo. Recommended size: 1200 × 400 px.
modals.imageLogoDescription: Upload a new logo. Recommended size: 200 × 200 px.
modals.imagePlaceholder: Upload or drag and drop an image
modals.visibilityPublicDescription: Visible to everyone. Appears in organization listings and search results.
modals.visibilityUnlistedDescription: Only accessible via direct link. Not listed publicly or in search.
modals.visibilityDescription: Choose who can discover your organization.
modals.startDateDescription: Select the date your organization was founded or began operations.

trees.title: Upload Tree Data

establishmentMeans.managedDescription: Trees were intentionally planted and are actively maintained by your community.
establishmentMeans.nativeDescription: Trees seeded and grew on their own. Species belongs in this region.
establishmentMeans.naturalisedDescription: Trees that arrived from elsewhere and have established a self-sustaining population.
establishmentMeans.uncertainDescription: Trees were already here when you started recording. Better to be honest than guess.
establishmentMeans.introducedDescription: Species was brought here by people, but this older record does not specify whether it became naturalised or invasive.
establishmentMeans.invasiveDescription: Species spreads aggressively outside its native range and can threaten local ecosystems.
establishmentMeans.legacyDescription: Legacy GBIF code preserved from an existing record.

validation.latitudeInvalid: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90.
validation.longitudeInvalid: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180.
validation.fieldGreaterThanOrEqual: {label} must be a number greater than or equal to {minimum}.
validation.fieldLessThanOrEqual: {label} must be a number less than or equal to {maximum}.
validation.dateInvalid: Date must be in ISO 8601 or common format (YYYY-MM-DD, MM/DD/YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY, YYYY)
validation.nearBoundary: Near boundary: this tree is outside the selected site and will be skipped.
validation.invalidBoundary: Invalid selected site boundary: the boundary could not be used for tree validation.
validation.invalidBoundaryFallback: the boundary could not be used for tree validation.
validation.outOfSite: Out of site: this tree is outside the selected site boundary and will be skipped.

modes.noneDescription: Upload these trees without grouping them into a dataset.
modes.newDescription: Start a new dataset for this upload so it is easy to find later.
modes.existingDescription: Append these trees to a dataset that already exists in Tree Manager.

fileDrop.uploadFileDescription: Drop a CSV or TSV file to get started. KoboToolbox photo attachments can be added with the optional Media Attachments ZIP below.
fileDrop.dragDrop: Drag & drop or click to select
fileDrop.koboZipDescription: Optional, but recommended for Kobo exports with photo questions. Add the matching Media Attachments (ZIP) export so Whole Tree, Leaf, and Bark photos can be uploaded to your PDS even when Kobo photo URLs are private.
fileDrop.imageSubmissionCount: {images, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} across {submissions, plural, one {# submission} other {# submissions}}
fileDrop.siteBoundaryDescription: Choose the project site this tree upload belongs to. Rows outside this selected site will be skipped during preview.
fileDrop.loadingSitesDescription: Finding site boundaries available for this upload.
fileDrop.sitesLoadError: Couldn’t load your sites right now. Refresh and try again before uploading tree data.
fileDrop.noSites: Add a site boundary before uploading tree data. Tree uploads must be assigned to a site.
fileDrop.boundaryOnly: Validation will use only this site boundary, even if other site boundaries overlap.
fileDrop.checkingBoundary: Checking that this GeoJSON boundary can be loaded…
fileDrop.boundaryLoadError: This site boundary could not be loaded as valid GeoJSON. Choose another site or edit this site before uploading trees.
fileDrop.siteUnavailable: The previously selected site is no longer available. Pick a different site before continuing.
fileDrop.siteNoBoundary: This site does not have a GeoJSON boundary. Choose another site or edit this site before uploading trees.
fileDrop.datasetDescription: Leave the trees ungrouped, create a brand-new dataset, or append this upload to one you already manage.
fileDrop.datasetDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the dataset contents, methodology, or purpose...
fileDrop.chooseDatasetDescription: New trees will be added to the selected dataset and appear alongside its existing records in Tree Manager.
fileDrop.loadingDatasetsDescription: Finding datasets you can append this upload to.
fileDrop.datasetsLoadError: Couldn’t load your existing datasets right now. You can still create a new dataset or continue without one.
fileDrop.noDatasets: You do not have any datasets yet. Create a new one for this upload or continue without grouping.
fileDrop.datasetUnavailable: The previously selected dataset is no longer available. Pick a different dataset before continuing.
fileDrop.gbifDescription: Uses GBIF standards. Your data will be published on the GBIF platform.
fileDrop.gbifDisclaimer: By uploading, you agree that your tree data will be published publicly on GBIF (Global Biodiversity Information Facility) and GainForest’s Green Globe. You remain the data owner. GainForest is the publisher.
fileDrop.selectSiteBeforeUpload: Select a site before uploading tree data.
fileDrop.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 10 MB (got {size}).
fileDrop.zipOnly: Only Kobo Media Attachments .zip files are supported.
fileDrop.zipTooLarge: ZIP file is too large. Maximum size is 200 MB (got {size}).
fileDrop.zipNoImages: No supported image attachments were found in this ZIP. Make sure you selected KoboToolbox’s Media Attachments export.
fileDrop.zipReadError: Couldn’t read this ZIP file. Please export Media Attachments (ZIP) from KoboToolbox and try again.

preview.selectSiteBeforePreview: Select a site before previewing tree data.
preview.title: Preview & Validate
preview.description: Review your data before uploading. Rows with errors will be skipped; go back to adjust mappings if you want to include them.
preview.boundaryLoadError: Couldn’t load the selected site boundary. Go back and choose a site with a valid GeoJSON boundary.
preview.allValid: All {totalRows, plural, one {# row is} other {# rows are}} valid and ready to upload to {siteName}.
preview.allInvalid: No valid rows found. Please go back and fix column mappings.
preview.partialValid: {validCount, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}} valid, {errorCount, plural, one {# row has} other {# rows have}} errors.
preview.showingRows: Showing {maxRows} of {totalRows} rows — all valid rows will be uploaded
preview.rowsWithErrors: {count, plural, one {# row with errors} other {# rows with errors}}
preview.uploadValidRows: Upload {count, plural, one {# Valid Row} other {# Valid Rows}}

manager.searchDatasets: Search by dataset, location, or status
manager.searchTrees: Search by species, locality, recorder, or date
manager.noTreesDataset: No trees in this dataset yet
manager.indexingDescription: We’re keeping this dataset view open while the indexer catches up. Try refreshing in a few seconds.
manager.searchEmptyDescription: Try a different species name, locality, or recorder.
manager.datasetEmptyDescription: This dataset is ready, but there are no tree records to review yet.
manager.selectUngroupedHint: Select trees to add them to a dataset, or open a record to review details.
manager.selectRecordHint: Select a record to review its details, measurements, and photos.
manager.treeDetailsDescription: Update the core Darwin Core occurrence fields for this tree.
manager.treeMeasurementsDescription: Manage the migrated bundled flora measurements linked to this occurrence.
manager.multipleMeasurementsReadonly: Multiple bundled measurement records were found for this tree, so measurement editing is disabled here to avoid overwriting the wrong record.
manager.migrationReadonly: Measurements are read-only until migration is complete for this tree.
manager.photosDescription: View evidence already linked to this tree and attach more photos over time.
manager.dangerZoneDescription: Delete this tree record and any linked measurements or photos.
manager.deletePhotoDescription: This removes the selected tree photo from the GainForest network. This action cannot be undone.
manager.measurementRequired: Add at least one measurement value to save.
manager.chooseValidDataset: Choose a valid dataset before continuing.
manager.noUngroupedTrees: No ungrouped trees are available to add.
manager.datasetCountUpdateFailed: The trees were added, but the dataset tree count could not be updated yet.
manager.createDatasetFirst: Create a dataset during tree upload before adding ungrouped trees to it.

trees.description: Upload tree biodiversity records from a CSV or TSV file.

mapping.title: Map Your Columns
mapping.description: {count, plural, one {# column found.} other {# columns found.}} Match each source column to a Darwin Core field.
mapping.unmappedCount: {count, plural, one {# column is} other {# columns are}} not mapped yet. They will be skipped. This is OK if they are not needed. Please check before you continue.
mapping.koboHandledDescription: {count, plural, one {# Kobo metadata or private attachment URL column will be} other {# Kobo metadata or private attachment URL columns will be}} ignored intentionally. Filename photo columns and row UUID metadata are still used behind the scenes to match images from the ZIP.
mapping.duplicateAria: Duplicate mapping — only the first source column will be used
mapping.duplicateWarning: Multiple source columns are mapped to the same target field. Only the first mapping will be used; duplicates are highlighted. (Photo URL columns are an exception — multiple columns can map to Photo URL for multi-photo trees.)
